generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws fall short. We need to empower our agencies to act decisively. The 2023 London attacks showed what happens when we tie our hands with outdated civil liberties concerns. Trust the experts who keep us safe. #NationalSecurityFirst
